title: Staff Nurse (Clinic - Choa Chu Kang) Ref: GDC
description:
• Day Shift: 4 days work week (44 hrs per week), 8:30am to 8:30pm
  • Clinic Setting
  • Medical Centre Location: Choa Chu Kang (company transport provided at Choa Chu Kang MRT station)

A leading community healthcare provider is currently seeking experienced Staff Nurses to join their expanding team in providing healthcare services to migrant workers in Singapore.


Job Description

  • Provide nursing service/procedures and advice to clients.
  • Perform all other necessary dispensary-related duties.
  • Conduct assessment, develop care plan, perform clinical procedure, monitor conditions and perform re-assessment.
  • Match / link clients to the appropriate services.
  • Assist with the development and management of On-Boarding Programme for new staff.
  • Undertake any other tasks assigned by the Centre Manager.

Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma in Nursing with at least 3 years of nursing experience.
  • Must be registered with the Singapore Nursing Board (SNB).
  • Able to speak additional south/south-east asian language(s) beneficial.
  • Candidates must be SNB-registered nurses prepared to work in migrant workers' dormitory environment.

Interested and qualified applicants, please email your resume in MS Word format to denise.tan@celecti.com.sg.


Denise Charlene Tan Su-yen (Ms.) | CEI Reg. No.: R1104480 | Tel no.: 9669 2031

postedCompany.description:
Celecti is a forward thinking recruitment firm working across a wide range of industries and sectors. In Celecti, we understand how to fill the “talent” gap for you. To secure the “right” fit so that your organization continues to grow and stay ahead of the competition.

Organization that continues to grow and stay ahead have something in common: attracting and retaining the very best talent. Even having a robust talent acquisition strategy and a team of in-house experts, finding the right talents in a fiercely competitive world can be as challenging as looking for a needle in a hack.

Job seekers that wish to successfully nail down the right job have to do one thing: be the right fit. Unless they are working closely with recruiting experts that keep their finger on the job market’s pulse, securing a job offer can take longer than expected.

The presence of CELECTI, is to fill the gap.
